hero.headline: Energy for ambitious people.
hero.sub: Your personal energy coach. Based on behavioral science, built for high performers.

howItWorks.title: How VOLT Sleep works
howItWorks.step1Desc: 5 minutes onboarding. No wearable needed. We create your Energy Profile.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Every morning 1 concrete action. With an explanation and an if-then plan.
howItWorks.step3Desc: 10-second check-in. The system learns from your patterns and adapts.

valueProps.title: Why VOLT Sleep is different
valueProps.noOverloadDesc: Other apps give you 20 charts. We give you 1 action that actually matters.
valueProps.adaptiveDesc: Your plan adapts based on your check-ins. Bad night? Different advice.
valueProps.scienceDesc: Built on COM-B, BCT Taxonomy, CBT-I principles and Self-Determination Theory.
valueProps.energyDesc: We focus on how you feel during the day. No scary sleep scores or shame.

pricing.title: Simple. Fair. Effective.
pricing.sub: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready for more.

landing.disclaimer: VOLT Sleep is not a medical device and does not provide diagnosis or treatment. Our advice is based on general behavioral principles for energy optimization. For serious sleep problems, we recommend contacting your doctor.

auth.loginSub: We send a magic link to your email. No password needed.
auth.signupSub: Create an account with your email. Free, no credit card required.
auth.checkEmailSub: We've sent a magic link to {{email}}. Click the link to continue.
auth.termsNotice: By signing up you agree to our

onboarding.step1Sub: Wake time is the #1 factor for stable energy.
onboarding.step2Sub: Answer honestly, no right or wrong.
onboarding.dipQuestion: Do you have an afternoon dip?
onboarding.step3Sub: Caffeine and screen use — the two biggest levers.
onboarding.screenQuestion: Do you use screens after 9 PM?
onboarding.step4Sub: So we can personalize your plan.
onboarding.chronotypeEveningDesc: You get going later, peak energy in the evening.
onboarding.goalDipDesc: No afternoon dips or energy crashes.
onboarding.autonomyNote: You choose the pace. You can always change this in settings.
onboarding.previewTitle: Here's a preview of your plan
onboarding.previewSub: Based on what you've told us so far, this is what we'd recommend today.
onboarding.previewNote: This is just a preview. Complete the onboarding for a fully personalized plan.

stabilizer.title: Stabilizer
stabilizer.description: Your rhythm is fairly stable. We'll fine-tune for optimal energy.

crash-prone.title: Crash-Prone
crash-prone.description: Your energy dips are noticeable. We'll address your rhythm and habits.

night-owl-drift.title: Night-Owl Drift
night-owl-drift.description: Your biological clock is drifting. We'll optimize your wake time and light exposure.

overcaffeinated.title: Overcaffeinated
overcaffeinated.description: Caffeine is masking your fatigue. We'll optimize timing and quantity.

dashboard.morningCheckinCta: 10 sec check-in — how do you feel?
dashboard.safetyHelpline: Need help? Call your local crisis line or contact your doctor.
dashboard.streakAtRiskDesc: Complete today's action to keep your {{count}}-day streak alive.
dashboard.trialCountdown: {{days}} days left in your free trial
dashboard.microWinDesc: Energy up +{{delta}} points this week. Keep it going!

checkin.wakeTimeLabel: What time did you wake up?
checkin.dipYesterdayLabel: Did you have a dip yesterday?
checkin.bedtimeLabel: When are you going to bed?

progress.title: Your progress
progress.weeklyReportLocked: Unlock your Weekly Energy Report with Premium.
progress.noData: Complete a few check-ins to see your progress.

paywall.title: VOLT Premium
paywall.sub: Unlock the full power of your energy plan.
paywall.proSub: For those who demand peak performance.
paywall.trialCountdown: {{days}} days left in your free trial

features.engineDesc: AI-powered personalization that adapts to your patterns.
features.reportDesc: Insights into your patterns, trends, and progress.
features.switchDesc: CBT-based tool for sleep anxiety and rumination.
features.historyDesc: Full access to your progress data and trends.
features.exportDesc: Share your progress with a beautiful card.

paywall.disclaimer: Cancel anytime. After the trial, you'll be charged automatically.

settings.title: Settings
settings.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This cannot be undone.
settings.disclaimerText: VOLT Sleep is not a medical device and does not provide diagnosis or treatment. For serious sleep problems, we recommend contacting your doctor.
settings.referralDesc: Share VOLT Sleep and earn free premium days.

cognitiveSwitch.title: Cognitive Switch
cognitiveSwitch.sub: A short exercise to reduce sleep anxiety.
cognitiveSwitch.premiumOnly: This feature is available for Premium users.
cognitiveSwitch.step1Sub: Write down the thought that's keeping you up.
cognitiveSwitch.thoughtPlaceholder: e.g., "I must fall asleep now or tomorrow will be terrible"
cognitiveSwitch.step4Sub: Choose one thing to do now.
actionOptions: Listen to a calm podcast or audiobook
cognitiveSwitch.disclaimer: This is not therapy. For serious mental health concerns, please contact a professional.

demo.title: Your personal Daily Energy Card
demo.sub: See what VOLT Sleep would recommend for you — no signup needed.
demo.signupCta: Want this every day? Sign up free.
demo.disclaimer: This is a demo. Sign up for personalized, adaptive recommendations.
